items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior for 'Package transfer to another customer'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete results or outcomes from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or data to assess the success or failure of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
